rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS WALKER et al VS. PLATINUM CAPITAL GROUP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel The Attendance Of Pltfs' Expert Tom Cook At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 10, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT AURORA LOAN SERVICES' Motion To Compel The Attendance Of Pltfs' Expert Tom Cook At Deposition GRANTED. Sanctions in the amount of $2,158.72 granted. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: QUINTEN JOSEPH FRY, BY THEO HONNIBALL, POWER OF VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Motion For Order Granting Leave To File Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 10, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF QUINTEN JOSEPH FRY, BY THEO HONNIBALL, POWER OF ATTORNEY's Re-Notice Of Motion For Order Granting Leave To File Third Amended Complaint Continued to April 26, 2013 to be heard with other pending motion. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of opposition to department 501 no later than April 12, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BGS COMPANY VS. NANCY YATES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 10, 2013, line 4. PLAINTIFF BGS COMPANY's Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment DENIED. However, for any further breach of stipulation, Plaintiff may come in for an ex-parte entry of judgment. Defendant shall remit March and April rent immediately and February rent no later than April 30, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 10, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFF MITCH KEIL AND MARY KEIL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CAPITAL ONE, N.A., ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SUCCESSORS VS. GUILLERMO SEVILLA BARRIOS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 10, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT REYNALDO GARCIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. It does not appear from the complaint that it is addressed to tenants. Demurrer raises facts outside the four corners of complaint. = (501/REQ)
